name: Sudu Adagena Kalu Awidin
overview: Sudu Andagena Kalu Awidin (2019) is a Sri Lankan drama series that follows Ayoma’s journey to uncover the truth about her missing father. As she and her mother navigate a remote village, they become entangled in a gripping tale of secrets, societal tensions, and unexpected revelations. Directed by Sunil Costa, the series blends mystery, satire, and emotional depth, earning critical acclaim and the Most Popular Teledrama of the Year award at the 24th Sumathi Awards.
